info.title: InsightFlare API
info.description: Privacy-focused web analytics API. Authenticated endpoints require an API key passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. All API times are ISO 8601 strings and analytics ranges use [from, to) semantics.

get.description: Returns service health status. No authentication required.

post.description: /collect is the unauthenticated client SDK ingestion endpoint. Successful receipt or silent drop returns 204.

get.description: Returns stable machine-readable discovery links. No authentication required.
Returns non-secret metadata, scopes, team, and site access for the current bearer token.

post.description: Checks whether the current token has requested scope and optional site permissions.

get.description: Returns features and limits available to the current token.
Returns the team associated with the current token.
Returns usage information for the current team.
Aggregates analytics over sites accessible to the current token.

parameters.name: preset
parameters.description: Named time range preset. Mutually exclusive with from and to.

parameters.name: timeZone
parameters.description: IANA time zone used to resolve presets.

get.description: Returns time-bucketed analytics over accessible sites.

parameters.name: preset
parameters.description: Named time range preset. Mutually exclusive with from and to.

parameters.name: timeZone
parameters.description: IANA time zone used to resolve presets.

get.description: Breaks down team analytics by accessible site.

parameters.name: preset
parameters.description: Named time range preset. Mutually exclusive with from and to.

parameters.name: timeZone
parameters.description: IANA time zone used to resolve presets.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous response.

get.description: Breaks down team analytics by a stable dimension.

parameters.name: preset
parameters.description: Named time range preset. Mutually exclusive with from and to.

parameters.name: timeZone
parameters.description: IANA time zone used to resolve presets.

get.description: Returns sites accessible to the current token.

post.description: Creates a site in the token's team. Supports Idempotency-Key.

delete.description: Deletes a site and associated analytics data.

get.description: Returns the script URL and HTML snippet.
Returns metrics, dimensions, filters, operators, intervals, and presets.

get.description: Returns the current active visitor count.

post.description: Executes up to 20 GET subrequests under /api/v1.

FilterObject.description: Simple equality filters keyed by stable dimension name.

ComplexFilter.description: Advanced filter rule for explore and search endpoints.

DimensionDefinition.description: Dimension available for analytics breakdowns and filters.

TrackingSettings.description: Tracking settings for the client script.

PrivacySettings.description: Privacy settings for visitor data handling.

BearerAuth.description: API key passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
